transcript: Speaker A: Fill in the blanks. They ______ vegetables last week. Speaker B: They buyed vegetables last week. Speaker A: Nahi, correct answer hoga, they bought vegetables last week. [No, the correct answer is, they bought vegetables last week.] Speaker B: Oh, theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh, okay, okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker A: Koi problem nahi. Arya AI Teacher try kiya? [No problem. Did you try Arya AI Teacher?] Speaker B: Par woh toh mehnge hote honge na? [But they must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 1 crore se zyada log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It's 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why more than 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minutes ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B: Wah, phir kaise join karu? [Wow, then how do I join?] Speaker A: Yeh install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sign up karo aur practice start karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's English grammar in a split-screen setup. She introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient AI English tutor requiring only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app.
